resume.resume_by: Extend the JWT expiry check in src/auth/middleware.ts to allow a small clock-skew leeway window.
resume.prompt: run python3 scripts/handoff-render.py feat-jwt-expiry and continue. next acceptance check: pnpm test src/auth/auth.spec.ts passes 6/6.

decisions: expiry uses Date.now() UTC ms (not new Date())
rejected_paths: new Date() — allocation in hot path

files_read_first.why: primary edit target for leeway parameter
lines 42-78 are the failing clock-skew tests

files_skip.why: historical context only; brief has the binding decisions
